role_summary: the tax litigation manager manages tax disputes, appeals, and legal proceeding s before tax  authorities and tribunals.
responsibilities: • handle tax litigation and dispute resolution   • prepare submissions, appeals, and legal documentation   • represent organization before tax authorities and tribunals   • coordinate with legal counsels and consultants   • track litigation status and risk exposure   • advise management on litigation strategy and outcomes
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong experience in tax litigation and representation   • legal drafting and analytical skills       audit & assuranc e roles
